name: PixelRAG
description: The end of web parsing. The beginning of scalable pixel-native search. link: https://pixelrag.ai/
summaryZh: The end of web parsing. The beginning of scalable pixel-native search. link: https://pixelrag.ai/ 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。

fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
